details.name: Wearable Submission Fee
details.description: Funds corresponding to the fee applied to every new Wearable submission to the Decentraland Marketplace

details.name: Names Minting Fee
details.description: Funds corresponding to the fee applied to Names minting

details.name: ESTATE DCL Marketplace Sales Fee
details.description: Funds corresponding to the 2.5% fee applied to every ESTATE transaction (Minting or secondary)

details.name: LAND  DCL Marketplace Sales Fee
details.description: Funds corresponding to the 2.5% fee applied to every LAND transaction (Minting or secondary)

details.name: Wearables Minting Fee
details.description: Funds corresponding to the 2.5% fee applied to Wearables minting on Polygon network via the Decentraland Marketplace

details.name: DAO Wallets Transactions
details.description: Transactions between the DAO Treasury and the DAO Committee wallets (e.g. Transaction gas refunds)

details.name: LAND Rentals Marketplace Fee
details.description: Funds corresponding to the 2.5% fee applied to every LAND or ESTATE rental transaction

details.name: NAME DCL Marketplace Sales Fee
details.description: Funds corresponding to the 2.5% fee applied to every NAME transaction (Minting or secondary)

details.name: DAO Committee Compensation
details.description: Deprecated committee. Kept for historical reasons, always 0.

details.name: Wearable Curators Committee Payout
details.description: Compensation paid from the DAO treasury to Wearable Curators Committee members (last 30 days)

details.name: Other
details.description: Other expenses from the DAO treasuries not categorized under specific committees (last 30 days)
